creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
This seems to be fixed in cmake 2.8.2, I cannot reproduce this any longer after:
- deinstall patched cmake-2.8.1
- remove and re-extract devel/cmake port directory
- apply patch for cmake-2.8.2
- make install (make sure
${LOCALBASE}/share/cmake/Modules/FindwxWidgets.cmake is unpatched)
- rerun test-case
